# minio_kms_metrics (Data Source)

Exposes operational metrics for the KMS connected to the MinIO server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_kms_metrics" "current" {}

output "kms_requests_ok" {
  value = data.minio_kms_metrics.current.request_ok
}

output "kms_uptime_seconds" {
  value = data.minio_kms_metrics.current.uptime_seconds
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `audit_events` (Number) Audit log events written.
- `cpus` (Number) Logical CPUs visible to the KMS process.
- `error_events` (Number) Error log events written.
- `heap_alloc_bytes` (Number) Bytes allocated on the Go heap.
- `heap_objects` (Number) Live objects on the Go heap.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `request_active` (Number) HTTP requests currently in flight.
- `request_err` (Number) HTTP requests that returned an error response.
- `request_fail` (Number) HTTP requests that failed to complete.
- `request_ok` (Number) HTTP requests that completed successfully.
- `stack_alloc_bytes` (Number) Bytes allocated for goroutine stacks.
- `threads` (Number) OS threads currently allocated.
- `uptime_seconds` (Number) KMS process uptime in seconds.
- `usable_cpus` (Number) Logical CPUs the KMS process is allowed to use.
